_chain_groups.name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

quests.display_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay
quests.description:
Ripper DeMerth wants you to kill Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure, for his role in the abandonment of the Citizens of the North.

Return with proof of his demise.

steps.description: Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

flags.disabled_text: This is not anything I'm interested in taking from you.

quests.description:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure has offered a reward for the death of Ripper DeMerth, a traitor to Port Azure.

Return with proof of the demise of Ripper.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

flags.disabled_text: This is absurd. You've given me Ripper's ear already. Did you go back and cut off the other one?

quests.description: You gave a tiny statue of a talking cat to a ghostly talking deer in a dream, and the deer gave you a nightmare.

steps.description: Turn in items to The Conductor.

flags.disabled_text: No thank you I have one already!

quests.description: You've encountered a dying wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher, and it has asked you to find her brother's tomb and defeat its guardian at the entry chamber. Upon doing so, you should return to this wish with a memory of the Burial

steps.description: Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

quests.description: You've encountered a second wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher. This one has asked you to find Balaste, in Vitheo's Rest, and see if you can sense a memory that might reveal if Vitheo was indeed laid to rest there, and what happened next.

steps.description: Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

quests.description: A wish of Fernalla has asked that you find Elwio the Traitor in Vitheo's Rest, within the Traitor's Halls. She feels a great sadness for him, but cannot recall why.

steps.description: Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

quests.description: Fernalla herself has asked that you find Vitheo and be sure his wordly remains are at rest. She has given you a key ingredient for lighting one of the braziers in his tomb to awaken the Guardian who watches over his inner sanctum's key.

steps.description: Turn in items to Fallen Fernalla.

quests.description: You've powered your Fernallan Rune

steps.description: Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

quests.description: You've heard a legend that if you were to approach the Gate of Fernalla with a worthy gift, it may open for you.

An old Hermit in Fernalla's Field has asked you to recover an old toolbox from a group of bandits who are passing through the area. 

If you are able to recover it, bring it back to him at his home.

steps.description: Turn in items to A Hermit.

flags.disabled_text: What sorcery is this... that is not mine! I have mine here!

quests.description:
There is a group of people hidden underneath Port Azure near the docks. A spoken password is required for safe entry - it's "Shadowtide".

You should investigate when you're in the city.

Vethalo Gala in Port Azure's undercity tunnels has offered you a key to Vitheo's Rest - a hidden tomb beneath the city. 

He's asking for one Sivakrux as a trade.

steps.description: Turn in items to Vethalo Gala.

children.name: Ritual Stone: An Apparition of Sivakaya
Ritual Stone: An Apparition of Sivakaya
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (1-10)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (10-20)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Elysia Thistlewick
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Albixt's Engagement Ring
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (1-10)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (10-20)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Elysia Thistlewick
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Albixt's Engagement Ring

factors.name: Turn in items to Vethalo Gala.

quests.description: You showed the two pieces of the Braxonian Portal to Braxon Elden, and he was able to combine them.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

quests.description: You need to find an Eldrich Crystal to power the Rune of Brax, and offer both items to the energy source at his Portal.

steps.description: Turn in items to Elemental Energy.

children.name: Braxonian Portal Shard (Fire): Braxonian Planar Guard (Fire)
Braxonian Portal Shard (Ice): Braxonian Planar Guard (Ice)

quests.db_name: A Magical Sword in Port Azure
quests.stable_key: quest:a magical sword in port azure
quests.display_name: A Magical Sword in Port Azure
quests.description:
There is a magical sword to be had in Port Azure. 

Find a Ruby and two Seaspices for Tristian, who is loitering in the back lots of the houses near the main gate.

steps.description: Turn in items to Tristan Warton.

quests.description:
Xander Zaxtrough in Hidden Hills made mention of a missing person he's hunting for. He suspects that the Molorai Militia are holding this person somewhere on Erenshor. 

He mentioned Old Krakengard specifically.

Trevor Urchand in Hidden Hills is doing research on Eldoth Molorai. He suspects Eldoth has ties to the resurgence of Necromancy on Erenshor, but needs to know more. 

He says that there may be Necromancers in the Bonepits, and should you find any of their ritual books, he'd like you to bring it to him.

steps.description: Turn in items to Trevor Ulchand.

quests.description:
A note was given to you by a strange hermit in Fernalla's Revival Plains. Its addressed to a C. Pillot. 

Find him, wherever he is, and deliver the note.

steps.description: Obtain and read Notes of a Hermit.
Turn in items to Chazz Pillot.

factors.name: Obtain and read Notes of a Hermit.

quests.description: You have demonstrated your faith in Sivakaya's Gift to proceed into the inner church of the Jaws of Sivakaya.

steps.description: Say "azynthi, Azynthi" to Ward of Piety.

factors.name: Say "azynthi, Azynthi" to Ward of Piety.

quests.description: A portal exists between Blooming Sepulcher and Vitheo's Rest - you can re-activate it by bringing a piece of Vitheo's Rest to the Remnant in Blooming Sepulcher
Amethi, just outside of town in Stowaway's Step, has expressed interest in making and repairing keys... if you find any broken ones, bring them her way.

quests.db_name: A Sivakayan Horn for Ludo Luxo
quests.stable_key: quest:a sivakayan horn for ludo luxo
quests.display_name: A Sivakayan Horn for Ludo Luxo
quests.description:
Ludo Luxo in Hidden Hills has asked for you to find a Sivakayan Horn from the Bonepits - a cave on the north side of Hidden Hills. 

They make great sharpening stones.

steps.description: Say "task, quest, help" to Ludo Luxo.
Turn in items to Ludo Luxo.

quests.db_name: A Skeleton Eye for Alyssa Fearnon
quests.stable_key: quest:a skeleton eye for alyssa fearnon
quests.display_name: A Skeleton Eye for Alyssia Fearnon
quests.description:
Return a Skeleton Eye to Alyssia Fernon in Hidden Hills. 

She has warned you that they're hard to come by, but every now and then you'll find one on a skeleton of any sort. 

She suggested searching in the cave on the north side of Hidden Hills.

steps.description: Turn in items to Alyssia Fearnon.

quests.description: You've powered your Solunarian Rune

steps.description: Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

children.name: Heart of Astra: Astra, Rogue of the Stars

quests.description:
Jeremie Galyard has offered to trade a trinket he found in Ripper's Keep that he says may have belonged to Azynthi. 

He wants 3 bottles of Azure Mead and a Seaspice.

steps.description: Turn in items to Jeremie Galyard.

flags.disabled_text: I'm still good pal, thanks anyhow.

quests.description: You've powered your Vithean Rune

steps.description: Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

quests.description:
You've earned the favor of a mysterious brotherhood by finding their lost friend.

Per their instructions, you should make your way to the sandbar beneath the statue of Vitheo for a ride to the mainland.

steps.description: Say "ready, yes, go" to Chance Barlow.

factors.name: Say "ready, yes, go" to Chance Barlow.

quests.description:
Rumors of methods to access the Ethereal Planes have been persistent throughout history. 

There may be a way to reach places not meant for humans, and reap the rewards within.
Ghostly beings of Erenshor can leave behind Aetheria if you destroy them. If you find any, Saya Seawatcher in Vitheo's Watch says she has a unique reward for you.

steps.description: Turn in items to Saya Seawatcher.

quests.description: Albixt Munger in Silkengrass fears that his missing wife is now one of the risen pilgrims in the area. If you find her engagement ring on one of them, return it to him for a reward.

steps.description: Turn in items to Albixt Munger.

flags.disabled_text: This is not it, I already have it.

quests.description:
Alice Hewer's necklace was eaten by a small crocodile near the lighthouse! 

If you find it, she would like for you to bring it back to her.

steps.description: Turn in items to Alice Hewer.

flags.disabled_text: You've already given me my necklace back. This one's not mine... weird that you found two!

quests.description:
Bring 5 Nagalok claws to Annaleigh in Salted Strand. 

She thinks she may be able to make something out of them that you would find useful.

steps.description: Turn in items to Annaleigh Hephan.

quests.description:
Aragath claims to have been imprisoned by a group of necromancers. He thinks they're behind a hidden door in the Island Tomb near a Stone Throne. 

Destroy the necromancers and collect their soul-stones, and reunite those stones with their linked watchlights to absorb their power.

Return the four charged stones to Aragath.

steps.description: Turn in items to Aragath Swellsteer.

flags.disabled_text: I will leave shortly, thank you.

quests.description: A strange hermit in Azynthi's Garden has taken note of you shouting his name. He asked you to speak it to him in person.
Fredrick in Port Azure would like bear meat.

steps.description: Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.

factors.name: Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.

quests.description:
A fisherman has brought you to a small island he happened upon. He claims that the Island matches the description of the lost Bellwain Isle, where a 100-year wanted Pirate retired into hiding with his wife with all of his treasures. 

The fisherman claims to have disturbed nothing, but something mysterious lingers in the air.
You've handed the lost love letters to Bellwain, but he told you they were not his to take.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Bellwain.

quests.description: You showed the writings from Fallen Braxonia to Braxon Elden, and he was most impressed.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

flags.disabled_text: Ah, these are not new... just copies of what you've shown me.

quests.description: Capture Leah's soul from her watchlight on Stowaway's Step
Capture Posta's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
Capture Revid's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
Capture Stalzo's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
You're not even sure if this really happened.

steps.description: Turn in items to Odd Statue.

quests.description: It may be beneficial to find a way to change the lighthouse color to brighten up the island further...

steps.description: Turn in items to Lighthouse Flame.

flags.disabled_text: ... *The flame flares, but does not change.*

quests.description: A Guard in Port Azure has offered you the job of Reliquary Caretaker. All you have to do is go inside and make sure everything is in order. After that, you can do whatever you'd like with it.
William Cardigo has asked you to find out what lurks in the Bonepits and clear it out before it emerges into Willowwatch.

steps.description: Turn in items to William Cardigo.

flags.disabled_text: Thanks, but you gave me one of these already.

quests.description: William Cardigo at Willowwatch has hinted that if you clear out the bonepits, and bring him proof of slaying the "glowing red demon" deep within, he'd make it worth your while.

Lucian has asked for your help in completing the Stowaway Step Ritual. He needs the following legendary items:

A Loss Stone
A Remnant of Sivakaya
A brain warped  by the Sivakayan Dementia 
A Nightmare Crystal

prerequisites.note: Lucian Revald spawns after quest completion

steps.description: Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Livingroom and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Resting Place and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Marketplace and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Auction House and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Bank and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Fountain and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Training Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Vendor and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

quests.description: The Rottenfoot Poachers have asked for Croc tails

Neziroth Daggerhart had his prized ancestral coin stolen by bandits somewhere in Stowaway's Step. 

If you find it, return it to him near the Shrine to Vitheo.

steps.description: Turn in items to Neziroth Daggerhart.

flags.disabled_text: What's this? A duplicate? This is definitely fake!

quests.description: You've achieved something impressive.

steps.description: Turn in items to Kio the Light Keeper.

quests.description:
A group of necromancers in the island tomb claim to be holding a demon named Aragath captive through magic. 

They have asked you to hand the demon an empty soulstone, to absorb his power and finally allow them to leave the island.

steps.description: Turn in items to Aragath Swellsteer.

flags.disabled_text: I do not need anything else from you. Thank you for your help.

quests.description: Edgar in Silkengrass has promised a generous reward for any Sivakayan Axes or Swords or Sceptres that you're able to bring him.

steps.description: Turn in items to Edgar Taether.

flags.disabled_text: I already have all I can eat!

quests.description: Varran Juctor in Fernalla Field would like some of the beads he sees the Risen Druids behind him wearing. Bring him as many as you can find.

steps.description: Turn in items to Varran Juctor.

quests.description: Through Larviso, Sivayaka has shown you that Azynthi's corruption has taken hold of all of the Gods of Erenshor. Fernalla, Vitheo, Soluna, and Brax.

Nyltih in Hidden Hills has asked for Faerie Dust from the nearby forest.

It could be dropped by any Faerie that you find.

steps.description: Turn in items to Nylith Valorro.

flags.disabled_text: Already got it from ya! Thanks anyhow.

quests.description:
You've been pulled into a game of hide and seek... 

Someone (or something) is waiting to be found on Shivering Step.
Handing a Riftsnare Gem to the Flickering Souls in Azynthi's Garden pulls them into full existence...

steps.description: Turn in items to Flicker of Souls.

quests.description: Benson Gamble in Hidden Hills is looking for Graveweed Leaf from the nearby Bonepits. It's located on the north side of Hidden Hills.

steps.description: Turn in items to Benson Gamble.

quests.description:
A Stormcaller named Windlae in Hidden Hills has asked that you find and fell a beast in the Brake called Grizzlepaw.

She has observed a remnant of a chain stuck in the beast's teeth that may have belonged to a friend of hers.

steps.description: Turn in items to Windlae Oldseer.

quests.description: Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains has asked you to take a package of supplies to Ripper's Keep. They'll give you a receipt, and if you bring that back to Hadden he'll reward you.

steps.description: Turn in items to Leena Halsted.

factors.name: Turn in items to Leena Halsted.

quests.description: Take the receipt of delivery from Ripper's Keep back to Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains.

steps.description: Turn in items to Hadden Passican.

quests.description:
Go to the Gate and tell the Guard there that you've registered to gain a key to the pass through to the rest of Stowaway's Step. 

(To tell the guard you've registered, target him and press ENTER to type. Type 'I'm registered'.)
Foreman Hauck in Port Azure has asked you to explore the Lost Cellar and find any Intel that may or may not exist down there. Bring it to him if you find it.

steps.description: Turn in items to Foreman Hauck.

flags.disabled_text: Oh... they made copies of it? Good for the collection, I suppose.

quests.description: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to find her a set of keys to Krakengard. The Bunk key and the Tower key are what she's after.

steps.description: Turn in items to Valrae Cleary.

flags.disabled_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

quests.description: PLACEHOLDER FOR CONTINUATION
Deliver the deportation papers to Kio the Light Keeper at the Lighthouse and collect his Gate Key for your own use.

steps.description: Turn in items to Kio the Light Keeper.

flags.disabled_text: You've done this to me already! Why rub it in?

quests.description: You should find the recipient of this note, it looks as though it's never going to find its own way.

steps.description: Obtain and read Note to Liam.
Turn in items to Liam Kilfa.

factors.name: Turn in items to Liam Kilfa.

quests.description: You have restored the Nighthollow Candle, but it is not lit. You must find a Braxonian Flame to ignite the wick and restore the Candle's true power.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxonian Flame Well.

quests.description: Handing an Essence of Lost Faith to a Stardust will take away its invulnerability.

You've made Malaroth Food with:
1 Octorunner
1 Frowney Clowney
1 Azure Mead

steps.description: Turn in items to Baking Oven.

quests.description: Prichard Zemoro has asked you to bring him a treasure map and an elixir of enlightment II. He says he'll give you a Sivakrux for each combo you bring. Prichard is in the slums of Port Azure.

steps.description: Turn in items to Prichard Zemoro.

children.name: Torn Treasure Map (Top Left): Molorai Archaeologist

quests.description: Mavik Estonia, of Ripper's Army, has requested you deliver a message to Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

quests.description: Find the four spirits of Shivering Step.
There is a fisherman waiting for you under the cover of night in Blacksalt Strand to take you back to Stowaway's Step.
A note found on Raval's corpse was accepted by the Solunarian Holy Guard. He was not happy to read it.

steps.description: Turn in items to Valao the Holy.

quests.description:
The Fisherman on the Azure Docks has promised you a trip to a lost Island in exchange for helping him finish his day's fishing quota. 

He needs 4 Octorunners.

steps.description: Turn in items to Shady Fisherman.

quests.description: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to bring her four Ogrespice leaves. Who knows what for?

steps.description: Turn in items to Valrae Cleary.

flags.disabled_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

quests.description:
A scribbled note from a madman in the desert has revealed that a mysterious stone that he was holding was the property of Orion Mycon in Port Azure. 

Orion may be interested in receiving it back...

acquisition.source_stable_key: item:gen - scribbles of a mad priest

steps.description: Obtain and read Scribbles of a Mad Priest.
steps.target_key: item:gen - scribbles of a mad priest

steps.description: Collect Scribbles of a Mad Priest.
steps.target_key: item:gen - scribbles of a mad priest

steps.description: Turn in items to Orion Mycon.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - scribbles of a mad priest

factors.name: Obtain and read Scribbles of a Mad Priest.

quests.description: In return for Seaspice, Percy Ildia gave you a note with instructions to give it to the boat captain on the docks who was preparing to leave.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Genevieve Voldance.

children.name: Seaspice: The Lost Sea Giant King

quests.description: You've found a strange boatman in The Blight and presented your found "Boat Pass" to him. He will grant you passage to Azynthi's Garden now, at your leisure.

Percy has asked for some Sea Spice and in return he has promised passage off of the island. 

He is behind the registration office.

steps.description: Say "Do, Favor, What, Need" to Percy Ildia.
Turn in items to Percy Ildia.

flags.disabled_text: Come on now... you're not that gullible!

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of the Hills in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Hidden Hills Receptacle.

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of Ripper in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Ripparian Receptacle.

children.name: Seaspice: The Lost Sea Giant King

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of Sands in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxonian Receptacle.

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of Silkengrass in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Silkengrass Receptacle.

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of Soluna in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Solunarian Receptacle.

children.name: Faded Journal Entry: Raval, The First Paladin

quests.description: You've placed the Rune of Winds in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Turn in items to Windwashed Receptacle.

quests.description: Raval, the First Paladin, has been trapped in an insanity wracked body for centuries. You've freed him and found his spirit, and his last wish is to know that Astra, the Celestial Dragon, has finally been removed from this plane.

steps.description: Say "presence" to Freed Spirit of Raval.
Turn in items to Freed Spirit of Raval.

flags.disabled_text: I'll leave shortly, thank you again.

quests.description:
Larviso in Loomingwood has told you about the Nighthollow Candle. It was stolen from The Wisp long ago. If you find any trace of it, bring it to him. 

He mentioned that a Sivakayan Darkwarden may have interest in it, or perhaps its lost in the Braxonian Desert... worse yet, an antiquities dealer may have recovered it.

steps.description: Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: What is this, a replica? We have the real candle already.

quests.description:
Orion Mycon has given you his damaged ring. If you can fix it, it's yours. 

He said you should find a jeweler for more help.

steps.description: Turn in items to Parmalee Gemlyn.

children.name: Tempest Stone: Upha, Priest of Brax
Tempest Stone: Upha, Priest of Brax

quests.description: Parmalee Gemlyn has asked you to bring back the broken ring, an Elderstone Shard, and a chunk of Citrine Sandsilver in order to repair Orion's Ring

steps.description: Turn in items to Parmalee Gemlyn.

children.name: Tempest Stone: Upha, Priest of Brax
Tempest Stone: Upha, Priest of Brax

flags.disabled_text: I can't do that again... it was too much for me.

quests.description: If you find four pieces of a treasure map, you can bring it to Cecil in Faerie's Brake to have it repaired.

steps.description: Turn in items to Cecil Threbb.

quests.description:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure was not pleased with the note Ripper had his men send along. 

He has warned you away from Ripper and his "traitorous army", and has said that if you can acquire their Insignia Badges, he'll reward you handsomly.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

quests.description: Ripper has mentioned rumors of Sivakayans in Port Azure. She has asked that you keep an eye open for evidence of that, and bring it to her should you find it.

acquisition.source_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

steps.description: Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

chain.quest_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

quests.description: Ripper has reviewed the encryption you brought to her and has determined that Sivakayans have gained access to Port Azure through the lighthouse. She has asked that you investigate.

steps.description: Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

rewards.item_stable_key: item:quest - insignia of loyalty to azure

quests.description:
Torado in Wardhaven has asked if you could help him gather components for The Rituals they must perform to restore Sivakaya. He needs:

1 Intact Faerie Wing
1 Devoratrix Thorn
1 Pink Pteriaped Feather

steps.description: Turn in items to Torado Zortia.

flags.disabled_text: I'm all set for now, but thanks

quests.description:
Alitho, a collector in Port Azure, has asked for you to bring him any Rottenfoot sashes that you may find. 

The Rottenfoot swamps would be a logical place to search for these sashes.

steps.description: Turn in items to Alitho Echeswer.

quests.description: Samuel in Hidden Hills has asked you to deliver a note to his good friend Harvey Alder, who is likely staying at the Azure Arms in Port Azure.

steps.description: Turn in items to Harvey Alder.

flags.disabled_text: Are you making forgeries now? Get a life.

factors.name: Turn in items to Harvey Alder.

quests.description: Feed an Eye of Plaxitheris to Occuphage under the lighthouse.

steps.description: Turn in items to Occuphage, Eater of Eyes.

quests.description: Keep your eyes open for any intel on how or why Sivakayans are gaining access to Port Azure. Share it with Guard Captain Kilkay if you find it.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

quests.description: You've learned that seeing is not always easy, but is possible in any light.

Serra Stile lost her family heirloom shovel in the Elderstone Mines incident. 

She believes it was taken by a slime. If you happen across it, return it to her.

steps.description: Turn in items to Serra Stiles.

flags.disabled_text: This is someone else's I think. I have mine already.

quests.description: The statue of Sivakaya has gazed upon you.
You've made quite a mark on Shivering Step. It's time to go home.

flags.disabled_text: Ah, deja vu is a fancy thing.

quests.description:
A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.

He has asked you to continue to search for information on how Sivakayans may be entering Port Azure.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

quests.description: A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

quests.description: A recovered journal of a Sivakayan Darkwardenl was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.
Ripper asked for you to bring any information you find on Sivakayan activity to her.

steps.description: Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

quests.description: Supply Sergeant Tipp wants Sivakayan Ore. He says their soldiers carry it sometimes, but it's hard to find.

steps.description: Turn in items to Supply Sergeant Tipp.

flags.disabled_text: I have all I need, thank you for your help.

quests.description:
Despite reports of Sivakayan raiders headed to Port Azure, none have been seen within the city. 

It is suspected that they may be lurking inside the city, somewhere in the shadows. 

If you're able to locate them, report to Captain Kilkay.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

flags.disabled_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

quests.description:
The Guard Captain in Port Azure has reviewed the Sivakayan Encryption that you have found and has determined that the Sivakayans have created a secret access point in the Port Azure Lighthouse.

He has given you a key and asked you to investigate.

steps.description: Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

rewards.item_stable_key: item:quest - insignia of loyalty to azure

flags.disabled_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

quests.description:
Once wielded by Soluna herself, the blade was forged from the metal of a moon and bathed in the flames of stars. It is rumored to exist on this plane. 

If your travels bring you across clues, take note.
You've found a Paladin trapped by Azynthi who claims to have had knowledge of Soluna's Celestial Blade stolen from him. If you can restore him, he may be able to share it with you.

steps.description: Turn in items to Apostalo Ostagla.

quests.description: TO BE CONTINUED
You have found a way to move the fallen angel statue out of the way on Shivering Step

Register yourself on the island by bringing your Dock Papers to Controller Wendyl in the registration office.

The registration office is the large building near the docks.

steps.description: Turn in items to Controller Wendyl.

quests.description: You are stranded on Stowaway's Step. There has to be a way off... You should ask around and see what you can learn.
Ta'Dah, the hidden Sorcerer for Ripper has stopped you and offered you a prize for collecting three intact mushroom caps from the cave near Ripper's Keep.

steps.description: Say "convenient" to Ta'Dah, Sorcerer of Ripper.
Turn in items to Ta'Dah, Sorcerer of Ripper.

flags.disabled_text: I do not need more, but thank you.

factors.name: Say "convenient" to Ta'Dah, Sorcerer of Ripper.

quests.description: You've found ancient Siva-Braxonian teachings that reveal some surprising world history. You've given them to Braxon Michaen who was very impressed.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxon Michaen.

quests.description: Liani Bosh in Port Azure has asked you to forge an Angler's Ring. With it, you can buy a trip back to Stowaway's Step.

steps.description: Turn in items to Liani Bosh.

factors.name: Turn in items to Liani Bosh.

quests.description: You met a strange being called "The Bridgekeeper" on Shivering Step
You met a strange being called "The Curator" on Shivering Step

To ignite, combine the following in the Dark Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
2 Blight Crystals
1 Blightwood slab
1 Spark of the First Flame

steps.description: Obtain and read Dark Flame Recipe.
Collect Spark of the First Flame.
steps.target_key: item:gen - spark of the first flame

steps.description: Turn in items to Dark Flame Brazier.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - spark of the first flame

factors.name: Obtain and read Dark Flame Recipe.

quests.description:
The Ceremonial Flame requires:
1 Ancient Coal
1 Elderstone Shard
1 Wolf Meat
1 Pristine Grass Spider Carapace

steps.description: Obtain and read The Duskenlight Ritual.
Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

factors.name: Obtain and read The Duskenlight Ritual.

quests.description: You have been told that it may be possible to combine an Eldrich crystal with an inert rune at the right place of power in order to power the rune once again.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

quests.description: You met a strange being called "The Gatekeeper" on Shivering Step
A strange ghostly statue in the Jaws of Sivakaya claims to have 'awoken the guardian' and that you should let it look upon you for a moment.

steps.description: Speak to A Memory of Sivakaya.

factors.name: Speak to A Memory of Sivakaya.

quests.description: You met a strange being called "The Harbinger" on Shivering Step
You've heard rumors of an old tomb on the island that has attracted the attention of strange ritualists. It may be worth investigating if you can find it.

To ignite, combine the following in the Life Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
1 Essence of Nature
1 Gift of Fernalla
1 Loomingwood Branch
1 Droplet of the First Frost

steps.description: Obtain and read Life Flame Recipe.
Collect Droplet of the First Frost.
steps.target_key: item:gen - droplet of the first frost

steps.description: Turn in items to Lifeflame Brazier.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - droplet of the first frost

factors.name: Collect Droplet of the First Frost.

quests.description: A Ghostly Figure has handed you a stone that contains the very sadness that has been brought upon the world by Azynthi. She instructed you to bring it to someone who might know its true power, she suggested someone who mourns the loss of Sivakaya may be best.

steps.description: Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: It's so incredible! Get it to Lucian.

factors.name: Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

quests.description: You've been told that it's imperative to get the Loss Stone back to Lucian at Stowaway's Step.

You've found the writings of a treasure hunter and you found his phantom on the Duskenlight Coast near the Malaroth Nesting Grounds. He has asked you to continue the hunt in his name, and directed you to his wife for help. He does not recall where he lived, but he says it was in a busy place. He gave you a small pin to prove to his wife that you've met him.

steps.description: Turn in items to Lost Soul.

flags.disabled_text: Oh my, someone made duplicates of these?

quests.description: You've reminded a phantom of who he was in a past life, and he has asked you to continue his treasure hunt. He gave you a pin and directed you to speak to his wife, using the pin as proof of having met him. He said she will help you pick up on his quest where he left off.

steps.description: Turn in items to Julie Xargate.

children.name: Pg. 1: Faded Entry: A Skeleton Captain
Pg. 1: Faded Entry: A Skeleton Captain
Pg. 2: Faded Entry: Molorai Captain Sigrid
Pg. 3: Faded Entry: Druo the Reborn

Pg. 3: Faded Entry: Druo the Reborn

quests.description: You have a deceased treasure hunter's journal, and a request from his widow to continue his quest. You should bring whatever you find back to him to help put him at rest.

children.name: Pg. 1: Faded Entry: A Skeleton Captain
Pg. 1: Faded Entry: A Skeleton Captain
Pg. 2: Faded Entry: Molorai Captain Sigrid
Pg. 3: Faded Entry: Druo the Reborn

quests.description: You handed a fisherman his lunch in in return he mentioned he may share a pirate tale.

steps.description: Turn in items to Shady Fisherman.

factors.name: Turn in items to Shady Fisherman.

quests.description: You should ask the Shady Fisherman on the Port Azure docks to tell you a tale. He claims to have found something in the sea that may interest an adventurous person like you.

steps.description: Say "Bellwain, tale, tell" to Shady Fisherman.

factors.name: Say "Bellwain, tale, tell" to Shady Fisherman.

quests.description:
You've found a note in the pocket of Brice Mathers. It instructs you to find his brother in Goodsoil. 

His brother's name is Yarren - if you cannot find him, ask for him.

steps.description: Obtain and read The Mathers Note.
Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: You have the key... if you've lost it I don't know what to tell you. I do not have another.

factors.name: Obtain and read The Mathers Note.

quests.description:
Yarren Mathers has given you a key to an old church he says is buried in the hills of Blacksalt Strand. 

Locate the church, and see what secrets it holds. 

Return any tomes you find to Yarren and he may share more of what he knows with you.

steps.description: Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: We've covered this already... show me anything new you find!

quests.description:
Yarren Mathers has studied the Chapters of Descent you found in the old Church.

The tale of Sivakaya, Azynthi, and The Wisp has become more clear, but is still shrouded in mystery. 

Yarren has asked you to search for more pages from the Chapters of Descent.

steps.description: Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: We have seen these pages already, have you forgotten?

quests.description: You've found some lost letters meant for Captain Bellwain, and you've given them back to Bellsie Bellwain.

steps.description: Turn in items to Bellsie Belwain.

quests.description:
Brackfruit Breaded Island Fin
1 Island Fin
1 Brackfruit Juice
1 Bread
1 Coal

steps.description: Turn in items to Baking Oven.

factors.name: Turn in items to Baking Oven.

quests.description: Jazmyn Challa in Port Azure has asked for you to bring back any clues that might prove her claim that Reavers are the true first people of Erenshor.

steps.description: Turn in items to Jazmyn Challa.

flags.disabled_text: Another copy... incredible. Keep that for yourself and enjoy the tale within.

quests.description:
The Ceremonial Flame in Fernalla's Revival Plains requires:

1 Ancient Coal
1 Faerie Dust
1 Remnant of a Day Dream
1 Remnant of a Nightmare

steps.description: Obtain and read The Fernallan Ritual.
Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

factors.name: Obtain and read The Fernallan Ritual.

quests.description: The odd Hermit has given you a Riftstone and instructed you to find "The Riftsnares" to "Pull the four souls into this realm and destroy them."

steps.description: Say "Umbran, umbran" to A Strange Hermit.

quests.description:
The Ceremonial Flame at Ripper's Keep requires:

1 Sivakrux
1 Planar Stone Shard
1 Ghostly Giant's Blood
1 Unborn Phobia

steps.description: Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

children.name: Ritual Stone: An Apparition of Sivakaya
Ritual Stone: An Apparition of Sivakaya
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (1-10)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (10-20)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Elysia Thistlewick
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Albixt's Engagement Ring
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (1-10)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Lost Treasure (10-20)
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Elysia Thistlewick
Elixir of Enlightenment II: Albixt's Engagement Ring

factors.name: Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

quests.description:
Braxon Elden in the Braxonian Desert has expressed interest in the scent of Brashell emanating from the covered well that has been recently excavated. 

If you you happen across any Brashell in your explorations, Braxon Elden may be interested in seeing it.

steps.description: Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

flags.disabled_text: It's so interesting to see this!

quests.description: Sivakaya has asked you to obtain the Secrets of Creation from the corruption that will manifest in the Stowaway's Step Portal. She wants you to bring it to The Wisp.

steps.description: Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: You must find a way to reach the Gods!

quests.description: You tried to give the Secrets of Creation to Lucian on Stowaway's Step, but he instructed you to bring it to Larviso in Loomingwood instead.

prerequisites.note: Lucian Revald spawns after quest completion

steps.description: Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

quests.description:
You've met a Shard of Sivakaya inside the portal at the Stowaway's Step Ritual. She warned you of a corruption taking over Erenshor, and asked that you help free the Gods who have touched this world. 

She faded out of existence after her warning, cautioning you of a manifesting corruption nearby.
Kio has summoned you to the lighthouse to get your lamp for whatever he has in store next.

The village of Goodsoil in Fernalla's Revival Plane was destroyed by forces unknown. 

Rumors are abound, but figuring out what truly happened may take more time.
You've returned a compass to Asaga Underloft in Port Azure, and he has asked you to continue to explore the mysterious portals in search of his missing father.

steps.description: Turn in items to Asaga Underloft.

flags.disabled_text: What is this? Are you making these yourself? Is this some sort of a trick?

quests.description:
Wally Waldorf is near the shop in Stowaway's Step and he really wants a Moongill fish. 

Moongill are known to come out at night and are famously hard to catch.

steps.description: Turn in items to Wally Waldorf.

flags.disabled_text: I already have all I can eat!

quests.description: You should find a way to ignite the Brazier deep in the cold Island Cave.

steps.description: Collect Soul of a Ghostly Beast.
steps.target_key: item:gen - soul of a ghostly beast

steps.description: Turn in items to Warming Flame.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - soul of a ghostly beast

quests.description:
The odd cultists won't say much, but one has mistaken you for their friend 'Wyland' before realizing his error.

If you find this 'Wyland', he may be holding a note or a clue as to what they're up to...

You've found a note on the Ghost of Wyland Sercher. 

Upon reading it, it has instructed you to speak a secret password to an "Elder Brother at the Ritual". 

Approach his brothers, and speak the word to them.

steps.description: Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

quests.description:
You have gathered seeds from all of the known Willows in Erenshor and given them to a Watcher high upon a hill in Willowwatch. 

In return, the Watcher has given you a special lens and claimed it will allow its wearer to spot hidden Sivakayans throughout the world. They are thought to wander nearly everywhere on occassion.

flags.disabled_text: I need but one seed from each tree, no more are necessary.

quests.description: Cagnus Marlsen in Willowwatch has asked for you to clear out the old Willow shrine so they can use the fertile soil to grow crops for their settlement.

steps.description: Turn in items to Cagnus Marlsen.

flags.disabled_text: Yeah ok I don't need all of it in bags, knock it off!

quests.description: You have returned a journal to Wishlan that he lost ages ago. He was gracious, and offered you an old trinket he once held dear.

steps.description: Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

factors.name: Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

quests.description: Wishlan handed you a bag of stones and asked for one to keep.

steps.description: Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

factors.name: Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

quests.description: Fredrick in Port Azure would like wolf meat.

steps.description: Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.

factors.name: Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.
